seoTitle: Kurmond vs Kurnell — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kurmond and Kurnell. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kurmond and Kurnell.
heading: Kurmond vs Kurnell — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kurmond, New South Wales and Kurnell, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kurmond has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Kurnell (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kurmond or Kurnell safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kurmond has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Kurnell scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kurmond scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Kurnell scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kurmond or Kurnell?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kurmond has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
